Oenothera, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant species (definition).

The health benefits of Oenothera beneckei are similar to those of Oenothera biennis. These benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and providing relief from symptoms associated with PMS and menopause. The gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) content in Oenothera beneckei is also known to help with pain management and eczema treatment.

The bioactive constituents of Oenothera beneckei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and gamma-linolenic acid (GLA).

The most common herbal preparations made with Oenothera beneckei include capsules and oil extracts, which are often used to support skin health and alleviate symptoms of PMS and menopause.
